scripts.mcp:server: sh -c 'if command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec uv run admin-mcp; elif [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then exec .venv/bin/python -m app; else exec python3 -m app; fi'
scripts.test: sh -c 'if command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec uv run pytest "$@"; elif [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then exec .venv/bin/python -m pytest "$@"; else exec python3 -m pytest "$@"; fi' sh
scripts.shop-key: sh -c 'if command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec uv run admin-mcp-shop-key "$@"; elif [ -x .venv/bin/admin-mcp-shop-key ]; then exec .venv/bin/admin-mcp-shop-key "$@"; else exec admin-mcp-shop-key "$@"; fi' sh
scripts.dev: concurrently -n mcp,inspector -c blue,magenta "pnpm run mcp:server" "pnpm run inspector"
